channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in C++ (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in C++ nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 Nightmare-Eclipse/BlueHammer (1794 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Nightmare-Eclipse

📝 Repository: Nightmare-Eclipse/BlueHammer

]]>

item.title: 📝 hypery11/flipper-tesla-fsd (677 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: hypery11

📝 Repository: hypery11/flipper-tesla-fsd

📄 Descrizione: Tesla Mod — Flipper Zero & ESP32. Nag killer, FSD region unlock, track mode, BMS dashboard, blind spot alert, high beam strobe, speed display, steering mode + more. Works via OBD-II or X179 connector.

⭐ Stelle: 677

🍴 Forks: 337

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: automotive autopilot can-bus canbus-research cybertruck electric-vehicle flipper-zero flipper-zero-app fsd fsdv14 hardware-hacking hw3 hw4 mcp2515 model-3 model-y obd2 tesla tesla-fsd tesla-mod

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-31T16:01:10Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-29T02:45:20Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 quantumaikr/quant.cpp (384 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: quantumaikr

📝 Repository: quantumaikr/quant.cpp

📄 Descrizione: LLM inference with 7x longer context. Pure C, zero dependencies. Lossless KV cache compression + single-header library.

⭐ Stelle: 384

🍴 Forks: 41

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: delta-compression embeddable gguf kv-cache llm llm-inference pure-c quantization transformer turboquant

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-28T22:07:24Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-25T15:49:42Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:

📝 Repository: tgies/copy-fail-c

item.title: 📝 tr4m0ryp/tr4mpass (66 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: tr4m0ryp

📝 Repository: tr4m0ryp/tr4mpass

📄 Descrizione: Free, open-source iCloud activation lock bypass tool. Remove iCloud lock from iPhone 5s through iPhone 15 Pro (iOS 12-26.1). Fully offline -- no servers, no payments. Supports checkm8 (A5-A11) and session activation (A12+).

⭐ Stelle: 66

🍴 Forks: 22

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: activation-lock apple bypass-tool checkm8 dfu icloud-bypass ios iphone jailbreak security-research

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-04T22:44:07Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-02T22:17:10Z
